title: JMIATRY 6 Metres Length 304 Stainless Steel Chain, 6mm Heavy Duty Chain Links, Black Galvanized Steel Welded Link Chains Lift for Fence Gate, Garage Doors, Swing Chains and Bicycle Security Lock
features: 👍【HIGH QUALITY】JMIATRY heavy duty chain made of high quality 304 stainless steel, strong and durable, won't break, black coating will not rust, color will not fall off, anti-rust, moisture-proof and corrosion-resistant, with strong bearing capacity.

👍【WIDE APPLICATION】The black steel chain heavy duty can be used for swings, clothes drying, chandeliers, potted plants, security doors, garage doors, garden fences, bicycle locks, dog walking, DIY decorations and so on.
👍【PACKAGE INCLUDE】The package include 6 metres length security chain, this length is enough for you to use it in many places, they are sturdy and durable, can be used for a long time.
👍【CUSTOM CUT】The steel chain can be cut any length what you want, can custom cut out different size chains to use in different places, it is an excellent choice for both home and commercial use.

👍【AFTER-SALES SERVICE】JMIATRY brand is very mature and loved by many people, we adhere to the attitude of quality first. If there is any problem about the usage of product or if product is damaged, please contact us, we'll solve your problem as quickly as possible.
